en.title: Bars
en.description: Manage multiple bar instances from one application. Each bar has its own recipes, ingredients, settings, shelf and users.

en.title: Shelf
en.description: Shelf is your personal dashboard. Here you can see all the recipes you can make with ingredients that you have, see your shopping list, check your bar stats and more.

en.title: API
en.description: Are you an engineer? With Bar Assistant, you have access to powerful APIs to integrate with your own applications and services.

en.title: SSO
en.description: Single sign-on support with multiple providers. No need to remember another password.

en.title: Open Source
en.description: Complete code for API and web client is open source and MIT licensed. You can self-host your own instance and have full control of your own infrastructure.

en.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><rect fill="none" /><path d="M184,197.67A72,72,0,0,1,64,144V112A72,72,0,0,1,184,58.33Z" class="accent" /><line x1="40" y1="112" x2="136" y2="112" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="16" /><line x1="40" y1="144" x2="120" y2="144" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="16" /><path d="M184,197.67A72,72,0,0,1,64,144V112A72,72,0,0,1,184,58.33" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="16" /></svg>
en.title: Made in the EU
en.description: Proudly made in Croatia. We collect the minimum required data needed to run and the service is GDPR compliant.

hr.title: Barovi
hr.description: Upravljajte svim svojim barovima iz jedne aplikacije. Svaki bar ima svoje vlastite recepte, sastojke, postavke, policu i korisnike.

hr.title: Inventar
hr.description: Koristite inventar kao vašu glavnu nadzornu ploču. Ovdje možete vidjeti sve recepte koje možete napraviti sa sastojcima koje imate, listu za kupnju, provjeriti statistike i još mnogo toga.

hr.title: API
hr.description: Jeste li inženjer? S Bar Assistantom imate pristup moćnim API-jima za integraciju s vlastitim aplikacijama i uslugama.

hr.title: SSO
hr.description: Podrška za jedinstvenu prijavu s više pružatelja usluga. Nema potrebe da pamite još jednu lozinku.

hr.title: Otvoreni kod
hr.description: Kompletan izvorni kod za API i web klijent je otvoren i MIT licenciran. Možete podići vlastitu instancu i imati potpunu kontrolu nad vlastitom infrastrukturom.

hr.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 256 256"><rect fill="none" /><path d="M184,197.67A72,72,0,0,1,64,144V112A72,72,0,0,1,184,58.33Z" class="accent" /><line x1="40" y1="112" x2="136" y2="112" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="16" /><line x1="40" y1="144" x2="120" y2="144" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="16" /><path d="M184,197.67A72,72,0,0,1,64,144V112A72,72,0,0,1,184,58.33" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="16" /></svg>
hr.title: Napravljeno u EU
hr.description: Ponosno napravljeno u Hrvatskoj. Prikupljamo minimalne potrebne podatke za rad i usluga je u skladu s GDPR-om.
